welcome.title: Welcome to HermesClaw
welcome.description: Your AI assistant is ready to be configured

welcome.title: Welcome to HermesClaw
welcome.description: HermesClaw is a graphical interface for OpenClaw, making it easy to use AI assistants across your favorite messaging platforms.

runtime.title: Checking Environment
runtime.installChoiceHint: Choose which runtime to prepare during setup. In Both mode, OpenClaw stays primary and Hermes is configured as an OpenClaw agent.

openclaw.title: OpenClaw
openclaw.description: Use OpenClaw as the primary runtime.

hermes.title: Hermes
hermes.description: Prepare Hermes-only mode without requiring OpenClaw startup in setup.

both.title: OpenClaw + Hermes
both.description: Keep OpenClaw as primary and wire Hermes as an OpenClaw agent.

windowsWsl.title: Windows Hermes availability
windowsWsl.description: On Windows, Hermes can use an experimental native home path or a configured WSL2 distro. Until one of them is available, Setup can only continue with OpenClaw.
windowsWsl.missing: Hermes and OpenClaw + Hermes are temporarily unavailable because no native Hermes home path or WSL2 distro has been configured yet.
windowsWsl.ready: WSL2 is ready with distro: {{distro}}. Hermes-only and OpenClaw + Hermes are available.
windowsWsl.nativeReady: Native Hermes path configured for experimental Windows support.
windowsWsl.nativeAndWslReady: Native Hermes path configured; WSL distro {{distro}} is also available.

issue.title: Environment issue detected
issue.desc: Please ensure OpenClaw is properly installed. Check the logs for details.

provider.label: Model Provider
provider.modelIdDesc: The model identifier from your provider (e.g. deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-V3)
provider.codePlanPresetDesc: Code Plan uses https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/coding/v3 and model ark-code-latest. Do not use /api/v3 for Code Plan traffic.
provider.storedLocally: Your API key is stored locally on your machine.

channel.title: Connect a Messaging Channel
channel.subtitle: Choose a platform to connect your AI assistant to. You can add more channels later in Settings.
channel.connectedDesc: Your channel has been configured. It will connect when the Gateway starts.

installing.title: Installing Essential Components
installing.subtitle: Setting up the tools needed to power your AI assistant
installing.summary: Preparing {{count}} installation phase(s) for this runtime choice.

stepHint.openclaw: Prepare the primary OpenClaw runtime used by the app and gateway.
stepHint.hermes: Prepare the Hermes runtime for standalone use or as an OpenClaw agent backend.
stepHint.bridge: Apply the Hermes-as-agent bridge wiring for OpenClaw primary mode.

failureSource.openclaw: The failure happened while preparing the OpenClaw runtime.
failureSource.hermes: The failure happened while preparing the Hermes runtime.
failureSource.bridge: The failure happened while wiring Hermes as an OpenClaw agent bridge.
failureSource.generic: The failure source could not be determined from the current backend result.

retryGuidance.openclaw: Check the OpenClaw package/build state and gateway prerequisites, then retry.
retryGuidance.hermes: Check Hermes installation prerequisites (including native path or WSL on Windows) and retry.
retryGuidance.bridge: Check the bridge prerequisites and retry after the runtimes are available.
retryGuidance.generic: Retry once after reviewing the error details. If it keeps failing, review the setup logs.

installing.wait: This may take a few moments...

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: HermesClaw is configured and ready to use. You can now start chatting with your AI assistant.
complete.footer: You can customize skills and connect channels in Settings
